title: 美国股指期货下跌，油价因特朗普威胁而上涨：市场综述
content: U.S. stock futures slipped while oil prices rose after former President Trump threatened a crackdown on oil regulators. Bloomberg’s market wrap notes the decline in equity expectations, contrasted by heightened demand concerns and regulatory fears that could push up crude levels, despite broader economic uncertainty.

title: A case study in testing with 100+ Claude agents in parallel
content: In our previous blog post, we introduced mngr and how you can use it to usefully launch hundreds of parallel agents. Here’s all the details… This script is seeded with a lot of content we wrote ourselves, but it is a bit tiring once we have written 50 or so examples. So we simply: Since we already have a lot of documentation elsewhere in the codebase—in particular, we have auto-generated man pages committed into the git repo, like this one —the agent does a good job of generating examples! In fact, even when it doesn’t, it’s still useful: that means our interface is too confusing or was not properly documented, and a human may have problems figuring out how to use it too. We then used that signal to refine mngr ’s interface to be as simple as possible. Asking agents to generate examples turned out to be a win-win situation–we either get good examples, or get bad examples and use that to improve mngr itself! Now that we have a healthy amount of tutorial commands, we can ask a coding agent to convert it into pytest functions. There are a few details worth mentioning. All of these are packaged into a slash command sync-tutorial-to-e2e-tests .
eventKey: case-study-testing-100-claude-agents
normalizedTitle: a case study in testing with 100 claude agents in parallel
scoreReasoning: 测试多个Claude语言模型，对AI领域有研究价值。
summary: The article discusses a case study that evaluated over 100 Claude language‑model agents running simultaneously, highlighting how parallel deployment of many agents can be managed and what performance insights were gained.

title: 人工智能股飙升400%助推香港IPO规模创五年来新高
content: Hong Kong's initial public offerings reached a five‑year high, largely driven by a 400 % surge in artificial‑intelligence shares. The strong performance of AI stocks has attracted investor interest, boosting IPO activity and raising the market’s overall valuation.

content: Contents AI 早报 2026-04-05 概览 Kimi 推出 Kimi Code 抢先体验计划，已开放申请 #1 NotebookLM 升级测验闪卡功能，新增总结与建议工具 #2 GPT-Image-2 模型在 ChatGPT 灰度开放 #3 2026-04-05 2026-04-05 read the source issue AI 早报 2026-04-05 视频版 ： 哔哩哔哩 ｜ YouTube 概览 开发生态 Kimi 推出 Kimi Code 抢先体验计划，已开放申请 ↗ #1 产品应用 NotebookLM 升级测验闪卡功能，新增总结与建议工具 ↗ #2 前瞻与传闻 GPT-Image-2 模型在 ChatGPT 灰度开放 #3 Kimi 推出 Kimi Code 抢先体验计划，已开放申请 #1 Kimi 现已推出 Kimi Code 抢先体验计划，付费用户可登录控制台提交申请，通过后即可获得更多额度并抢先体验最新 Code 模型。 根据 Kimi 官方消息， Kimi 现已推出 Kimi Code 抢先体验计划。付费用户目前可通过该产品的控制台提交申请，加入该计划后，参与者不仅可以获得更多的使用额度，还能提前体验其最新的 Code 模型。 相关链接： https://www.kimi.com/code NotebookLM 升级测验闪卡功能，新增总结与建议工具 #2 NotebookLM 升级 Quizzes 与 Flashcards 功能，现支持练习后自动生成摘要及复习建议，并新增重生成工具，允许用户针对特定知识点定制新题，实现精准强化。 NotebookLM 的 Quizzes 与 Flashcards 功能迎来升级。此次更新优化了学习反馈机制，用户在完成每组测验或闪卡练习后，该系统不仅自动生成涵盖已学主题的摘要，还提供下一步学习内容的具体建议。 此外，该产品同步引入了全新的 re-generate tool 。针对需要进一步巩固的特定知识点，用户可通过该工具重新生成练习题，将后续测验重点精准聚焦于想要多加练习的主题，从而实现更具针对性的学习体验。 相关链接： https://x.com/NotebookLM/status/2040227127082295424 GPT-Image-2 模型在 ChatGPT 灰度开放 #3 据用户反馈， OpenAI 正在向部分 ChatGPT 用户开放新一代图像生成模型 GPT-Image-2 ，并已在 Chatbot Arena 平台使用特定代号进行测试。 早期体验者称，该模型展现了卓越的文本渲染能力和丰富的世界知识，表现或优于 Nano Banana Pro 等竞品。 据社交媒体消息， OpenAI 新图像模型 GPT-Image-2 正向部分 ChatGPT 用户逐步推出。该模型同时在 Chatbot Arena 以 maskingtape-alpha 、 gaffertape-alpha 和 packingtape-alpha 为代号接受测试。 据社区用户早期反馈，该模型具备丰富世界知识和出色文本渲染能力，表现可能优于 Nano Banana Pro 。 提示 ：内容由AI辅助创作，可能存在 幻觉 和 错误 。 ‹ 2026-04-06 2026-04-04 ›
scoreReasoning: AI领域更新，对行业有影响，与用户关注方向相关。
summary: Kimi has launched a Kimi Code early‑access program, allowing paid users to apply through the console for extra usage limits and beta access to new Code models. NotebookLM updated its Quizzes and Flashcards by adding automated summaries, study suggestions, and a re‑generate tool for targeted practice. OpenAI is gradually rolling out the GPT‑Image‑2 image generation model to some ChatGPT users, testing it on the Chatbot Arena under various masks; early reports suggest strong text rendering and comprehensive world knowledge.

Most companies seeking to list are in emerging sectors, and there are currently over 500 pending applications. In uncertain external conditions, many firms view Hong Kong as a critical platform for raising funds and expanding overseas.

title: Running Google Gemma 4 Locally with LM Studio's New Headless CLI and Claude Code
content: LM Studio 0.4.0 introduced llmster and the lms CLI. Here is how I set up Gemma 4 26B for local inference on macOS that can be used with Claude Code. Running Google Gemma 4 Locally With LM Studio’s New Headless CLI & Claude Code LM Studio 0.4.0 introduced llmster and the lms CLI. Here is how I set up Gemma 4 26B for local inference on macOS that can be used with Claude Code. 1 Share Why run models locally? Cloud AI APIs are great until they are not. Rate limits, usage costs, privacy concerns, and network latency all add up. For quick tasks like code review, drafting, or testing prompts, a local model that runs entirely on your hardware has real advantages: zero API costs, no data leaving your machine, and consistent availability. Google’s Gemma 4 is interesting for local use because of its mixture-of-experts architecture. The 26B parameter model only activates 4B parameters per forward pass, which means it runs well on hardware that could never handle a dense 26B model. On my 14” MacBook Pro M4 Pro with 48 GB of unified memory, it fits comfortably and generates at 51 tokens per second. Though there’s significant slowdowns when used within Claude Code from my experience. Google released Gemma 4 as a family of four models, not just one. The lineup spans a wide range of hardware targets: The “E” models (E2B, E4B) use Per-Layer Embeddings to optimize for on-device deployment and are the only variants that support audio input (speech recognition and translation). The 31B dense model is the most capable, scoring 85.2% on MMLU Pro and 89.2% on AIME 2026. Why I picked the 26B-A4B. T

title: 做了一个给 AI 智能体做实时安全拦截的开源工具，欢迎来喷
content: 程序员 - @one121121 - 起因是我在用 Claude Code 的时候，突然意识到这东西有完整权限在我电脑上跑，我完全不知道它下一步会干什么。现在 Claude Code 、Cursor 这类智能体工具越来越能干，能直 起因是我在用 Claude Code 的时候，突然意识到这东西有完整权限在我电脑上跑，我完全不知道它下一步会干什么。 现在 Claude Code 、Cursor 这类智能体工具越来越能干，能直接操作文件、跑脚本、调接口。但出事了怎么办？强制删除系统文件跑了，密钥泄了，一步步看起来没问题的操作组合成了数据外泄链路…… 然后就做了这个： https://github.com/chenglin1112/AgentTrust 简单说就是在智能体和工具之间加一层保护，每个操作执行前先过安全检查，拦得住就拦，拦不确定就让语言模型来判断，判断有风险就锁住，顺带告诉你怎么改。 比较有意思的功能是攻击链检测——单独看「读取配置文件」没问题，单独看「发请求到外部地址」也没问题，但两步连起来再加个编码操作就是数据外泄，会被识别并拦截。 现在已经支持协议原生接入，Claude Code 和 Cursor 配置很简单。 还很早期，测试集是合成数据，生产环境没验证过。但如果你在跑智能体，可以试试，欢迎来找茬。 Python 3.9 以上，Apache 2.0 协议。 思路跟我开发的 github.com/kocort/kocort 很类似哦，策略工具可以直接改用一个本地模型做拦截 @ beyondstars 对，他们确实有逐步审批模式，但有两个场景它处理不了：一是自动化流水线里没有人在盯着批准；二是单步看起来完全正常、人也会批准，但跨多步组合起来是攻击链。AgentTrust 主要解决的是这两块，尤其是第二个——语义层面的多步风险识别，纯审批模式识别不出来。 @ libii 去看了一下，确实有不少相似的地方！我这边目前侧重的是规则引擎 + 语言模型兜底的混合判断，以及跨会话的攻击链检测。你用本地模型做拦截这个思路很有意思，延迟和隐私方面会有优势。有机会可以交流一下。 语言模型兜底的情况下有对缓存做什么处理吗 比如上次请求体是 100K ，这次是 110K 只有 10K 的新 token ，这个情况能处理吗 @ blueskeay 目前没有专门针对这个场景做缓存优化，AgentTrust 本身是无状态的拦截层，每次请求独立处理。 你说的这个场景如果接入了 Anthropic 或 OpenAI 的提示词缓存，缓存命中的部分理论上不重复计费，但 AgentTrust 这层目前没有感知缓存状态的机制，也没有做增量 token 的差分识别。 这其实是个值得做的方向 感谢提出这个问题!!!
eventKey: 做了一个给-智能体做实时安全拦截的开源工具-欢迎来喷
normalizedTitle: 做了一个给 ai 智能体做实时安全拦截的开源工具 欢迎来喷
scoreReasoning: 开源工具对AI安全性有潜在影响，与AI模型安全相关，未来影响较大。
summary: I developed an open‑source tool, AgentTrust, to enforce real‑time security checks between AI agents and system tools. Before any action, the tool evaluates the operation; if uncertain, it defers to the language model, which cautions the user and blocks potentially risky commands. It can detect attack chains—e.g., harmless reading of a config plus an external request combined with encoding. The library supports direct protocol integration, is easy to configure for Claude Code and Cursor, and requires Python 3.9+.

title: 对滞胀的担忧重创英国房地产市场信心
content: Stagflation concerns are eroding confidence in the UK housing market, according to a recent Financial Times article. Investors and buyers are wary of rising inflation combined with stagnating growth, which threatens property prices and development plans. The uncertainty is dampening demand and investment, further weakening an already fragile sector.

title: Codex is switching to API pricing based usage for all users
content: Learn how Codex credit rates work across Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise/Edu plans. All Collections Codex Codex rate card Codex rate card Learn how Codex credit rates work across Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise/Edu plans. Overview This article outlines the current credit rates for Codex, under the flexible pricing structure for Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise/Edu plans. Learn more about credits in ChatGPT Plus and Pro. Learn more about credits in ChatGPT Business, Enterprise, and Edu. Note : As of April 2, 2026, we’ve updated Codex pricing to align with API token usage, instead of per-message pricing. This change is applicable to new and existing ChatGPT Business and new ChatGPT Enterprise plans - please refer to the new rate card in the section below for details. Customers on existing Plus, Pro and Enterprise/Edu plans should continue to use the legacy rate card . We’ll migrate you to the new rates in the upcoming weeks. All customers should carefully review both rate cards to understand the pricing changes, and how they apply to your plan. This rate card applies to the following customer plans: New and existing ChatGPT Business customers New Enterprise customers Codex usage is priced based on API token usage, calculated as credits per million input tokens, cached input tokens and output tokens. Learn more about tokens here . This format replaces average per-message estimates with a direct mapping between token usage and credits. It is most useful when you want a clearer view of how input, cached input, and output affect credit consumption. Under this model, ac

title: 受宏观风险影响，印度银行股950亿美元的暴跌可能进一步加剧
content: Indian bank shares have fallen $95 billion amid heightened macroeconomic risk. This sharp decline could worsen if underlying economic pressures—such as slowing growth, high inflation, or tightening credit—persist, potentially further hurting the banking sector. The drop underscores the vulnerability of Indian banks to broader market and economic conditions.

title: 哪个财富层次的人跃迁最难？
content: The hardest transition in wealth accumulation is moving from 1 million to 10 million yuan. Data from China’s 4.94‑billion households show that 14.17% hold ≥1 million, but only 0.42% hold ≥10 million. The jump from 1 million to 10 million reduces the probability of success drastically, requiring a shift from labor income to asset‑based income and skills such as investment knowledge and entrepreneurial thinking. Once beyond this threshold, additional wealth grows more through assets and systems than personal effort.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 何纯在南国

The jump from 1 million to 10 million reduces the probability of success drastically, requiring a shift from labor income to asset‑based income and skills such as investment knowledge and entrepreneurial thinking. Once beyond this threshold, additional wealth grows more through assets and systems than personal effort.

title: 和君善行周刊:茅台涨价对贵州省及股东贡献和价值探讨
content: 本周医美紧张，纽约WTI原油期货大涨约11.93%。 本周重点分享A股价值投资标杆、印钱机器、现金奶牛，被称为液体黄金的股王贵州茅台公开提高出厂价和市场指导价的事件对贵州省及股东的贡献。 3月30日，贵州茅台酒股份有限公司公告，经研究决定，公司自2026年3 月31日起，将飞天53%vol500ml贵州茅台酒（2026）销售合同价由1169元/瓶调整为1269元/瓶、自营体系零售价由1499元/瓶调整为1539元/瓶。飞天茅台的销售合同价每瓶上调100元，涨幅为8.55%；自营体系零售价每瓶上调40元，涨幅为2.67%。 巴菲特一直钟爱品牌消费品企业…

title: AI 正在杀死中层管理 | 原文
content: AI is reshaping corporate structures by eliminating mid‑level managers. Jack Dorsey of Block recently cut 4,000 employees, citing a shift from hierarchical to intelligence‑driven organization. A broad industry conversation has followed, with leaders like Palantir’s CTO and venture partners arguing that the traditional middle management role, which has existed for two thousand years, is obsolete in the age of AI. The trend reflects a move toward flatter, more agile companies.

title: XXL-JOB v3.4.0 发布 | OpenClaw 集成、合并调度、健壮性及体验增强
content: 程序员 - @xuxueli - ### Release Notes- 1 、 [新增] 集成 OpenClaw: AI 执行器新增“openClawJobHandler”内置任务，与 OpenClaw 集成打通，支持快速开发 Release Notes 1 、 [新增] 集成 OpenClaw: AI 执行器新增“openClawJobHandler”内置任务，与 OpenClaw 集成打通，支持快速开发 AI 类任务； 2 、 [增强] 任务合并调度：任务调度后批量合并更新，高频调度场景可百倍降低 SQL 操作合并执行，提升调度性能； （任务调度后批量合并更新配置：“xxl.job.schedule.batchsize”） 3 、 [优化] 调度日志支持执行器维度查看，提升体验；新增调度日志索引，提升查询性能； 4 、 [优化] 一致性哈希路由算法优化，重构哈希环逻辑提升代码简洁性； 5 、 [优化] Cron 解析工具优化，解决 day-of-month 使用 L 时会跳过非 31 天的月份问题； 6 、 [优化] 执行器注册表主键调整为 long 数据类型，防止大规模执行器集群注册数据溢出； 7 、 [优化] 任务参数长度调整，最长支持 2048 字符； 8 、 [优化] 执行器名称长度调整，最长支持 64 字符； 9 、 [修复] 固定间隔模式调度策略调整，修复小概率下触发时间偏差问题； 10 、 [调整] Docker 基础镜像调整为 eclipse-temurin ； 11 、 [优化] 父 POM 依赖配置优化，移除容易配置；合并 PR-3926 ； 12 、 [优化] 调度组件触发判断优化，合并 PR-2502 ； 13 、 [优化] 调度日志调整，完善日志参数信息，合并 PR-2761 ； 14 、 [重构] 代码重构优化：I18N 国际化、属性加载、报表 SQL 等逻辑重构，合并 PR-2888 、PR-3006 、PR-3027 、PR-3198 、PR-3285 ； 15 、 [重构] 告警组件初始化重构，提升代码可维护性，合并 PR-2903 ； 16 、 [升级] 升级多项 maven 依赖至较新版本； 备注： 数据库升级脚本： -- 任务日志表：添加索引 create index I_jobgroup on xxl_job_log (job_group); -- 执行器表：修改字段长度 alter table xxl_job_group modify title varchar(64) not null comment '执行器名称'; -- 执行器注册表：修改自增 ID 类型 alter table xxl_job_registry modify id bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT; -- 任务表：修改字段长度 alter table xxl_job_info modify executor_param text null comment '任务参数'; -- 日志表：修改字段长度 alter table xxl_job_log modify executor_param text null comment '任务参数'; OpenClaw 任务示例 AI 执行器内置“openClawJobHandler”任务，与 OpenClaw 集成打通，支持快速开发 AI 类任务； 步骤一：调度中心，OpenClaw 任务配置 步骤二：任务执行，查看任务进度及日志 常规任务示例 XXL-JOB 支持多模式任务，下文以简单的“Bean 模式任务”为例介绍，三步快速开发接入。 步骤一：执行器，开发 Job 方法 @XxlJob("demoJobHandler") public voi
eventKey: xxl-job-openclaw-合并调度-健壮性及体验增强
normalizedTitle: xxl-job v3 4 0 发布 openclaw 集成 合并调度 健壮性及体验增强
representativeSources: 开源中国-全部 - 许雪里
scoreReasoning: Software update with potential impact on AI task development.
summary: XXL‑JOB v3.4.0 introduces OpenClaw integration with a built‑in “openClawJobHandler” for fast AI task development. It adds batch‑update scheduling, reducing SQL load, and enhances logging, routing, and cron parsing. Configuration limits for task parameters (2048 chars) and executor names (64 chars) are increased, and executor ID types are changed to long. Minor fixes, Docker image switch, dependency upgrades, and code refactors improve stability, performance, and usability. The release includes updated database scripts and expanded features for AI and security.

title: Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI
content: For eight years, I’ve wanted a high-quality set of devtools for working with SQLite. Given how important SQLite is to the industry1, I’ve long been puzzled that no one has invested in building a really good developer experience for it2. A couple of weeks ago, after ~250 hours of effort over three months3 on evenings, weekends, and vacation days, I finally released syntaqlite (GitHub), fulfilling this long-held wish. And I believe the main reason this happened was because of AI coding agents4. Of course, there’s no shortage of posts claiming that AI one-shot their project or pushing back and declaring that AI is all slop. I’m going to take a very different approach and, instead, systematically break down my experience building syntaqlite with AI, both where it helped and where it was detrimental. I’ll do this while contextualizing the project and my background so you can independently assess how generalizable this experience was. And whenever I make a claim, I’ll try to back it up with evidence from my project journal, coding transcripts, or commit history5. A couple of weeks ago, after ~250 hours of effort over three months 3 on evenings, weekends, and vacation days, I finally released syntaqlite ( GitHub ), fulfilling this long-held wish. And I believe the main reason this happened was because of AI coding agents 4 . title: 《因为独特》泡泡玛特创始人王宁访谈实录（摘录）
content: 01怎么理解盲盒 王宁：它（盲盒）就像打折一样简单。打折这个方法谁都可以用。以前没有听说过打折卖的产品，突然有家公司说我这里打折促销，来我这儿买东西可以打9折或者8折，生意一下子变得很火爆。然后大家都看到了这个情况，就全部跟着打折。但是等到最后就会发现，不是说打折顾客就买了，顾客还是要看买的是什么东西，这个东西是不是自己需要的，以及是不是自己想要的。 李翔：所以你对盲盒的理解，其实就是一种营销方法或者说营销手段？ 王宁：第一，我觉得这跟我们早期提出的“零售娱乐化”理念很契合，是对这个理念的核心执行方式之一。第二，我们之所以提出“零售娱乐化…

01怎么理解盲盒 王宁：它（盲盒）就像打折一样简单。打折这个方法谁都可以用。以前没有听说过打折卖的产品，突然有家公司说我这里打折促销，来我这儿买东西可以打9折或者8折，生意一下子变得很火爆。然后大家都看到了这个情况，就全部跟着打折。但是等到最后就会发现，不是说打折顾客就买了，顾客还是要看买的是什么东西，这个东西是不是自己需要的，以及是不是自己想要的。

李翔：所以你对盲盒的理解，其实就是一种营销方法或者说营销手段？

王宁：第一，我觉得这跟我们早期提出的“零售娱乐化”理念很契合，是对这个理念的核心执行方式之一。第二，我们之所以提出“零售娱乐化…

title: Functional programming accellerates agentic feature development
content: AI agents fail in production because of mutable state, hidden dependencies, and side effects the agent can Speed Read AI agents keep failing. The fix is 40 years old. Cyrus Radfar on March 30, 2026 13 min read · Speed Read Share Link Speed Read 350 WPM Start Reading “ ” ai , developer-tools , engineering TL;DR AI agents break in production because codebases weren’t built for them. Mutable state, hidden dependencies, and entangled side effects make agent output non-deterministic and impossible to debug. Functional programming fixes the architecture. I formalized this into two frameworks: SUPER (five code principles) and SPIRALS (a seven-step process loop). They’re how I build everything now. Code examples in this post are available in five languages. Pick yours: Pseudocode Python TypeScript Go Rust The pattern I keep seeing An agent reads a function that takes a list and returns a list. It writes tests. They pass. The function fails in production because it depends on a global config and a database singleton the signature never declared. The agent had no way to know. This isn’t a model problem. Functional programmers solved it in the 1980s. I’ve shipped AI products for over a decade, and the trajectory is always the same: impressive demo, promising pilot, gradual degradation, debugging nightmare, project abandoned. Most agent projects never make it to production . The ones that do often get rolled back within a year. MIT found 95% of AI pilots fail to deliver ROI . The instinct is to blame the models. “GPT-5 will fix it” or “we need better prompts.” The fa

title: 为什么有人开始用 CE 替代 Superpowers？关键不只是流程，而是“记忆” | 原文
content: Some teams are switching from Superpowers to CE. The switch is not merely about moving workflows; it centers on “memory.” CE stores design decisions and progress in a more persistent, shared format, improving long‑term recall and collaboration. This memory focus helps avoid repeated mistakes and maintains continuity, offering an advantage over the transient, code‑centric nature of Superpowers.
